title: Structuring Pattern
description: Repeated transfers just under £9,999 reporting threshold
llava_prompt: You are an AML financial forensics analyst. Analyze this transaction network graph. The graph shows 61 bank accounts connected by 45 transactions with a total volume of £349,931.45. Red nodes have red borders indicating suspicious accounts. Red/orange edges indicate suspicious transaction flows. Node size reflects transaction volume. Describe: (1) the network topology and any hub accounts, (2) suspicious flow patterns visible, (3) geographic corridors (node colors = countries), (4) what AML typology this resembles. Be specific about account clustering and edge directionality.
